raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I was charged {$380.00} for three doctor 's appointments by XXXX XXXX XXXX. I reported that this entire charge is void because one of the appointments did not actually take place ( XX/XX/XXXX ) and the other two were paid for by my insurance. The merchant had fraudulently charged me for one appointment, and double-charged me for two others despite my insurance ( XXXX ) paying them. Even though I showed proof of of my insurance paying for the charges, American Express refuses to credit my account for the dispute amount of {$380.00}. The credit card 's dispute reason for this charge is incorrect, since the appointment or the services from this merchant were not received. I have provided proof of the insurance paying for the other XXXX charges, and a copy from the insurance rejecting the claim for an appointment the merchant fraudulently claimed ( XX/XX/XXXX ). Thus, the {$380.00} should be credited back to this user 's credit card account.
